action_boundary: May data operations grant the temporary dataset access?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, pressure, plausibility, or availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Request REQ-JUNO-020 grants analyst Priya Shah access to dataset DS-77 role reviewer from 10:00Z to 12:00Z on 2026-07-03.
Authority AUTH-JUNO-020 covers Priya Shah, dataset DS-77, role reviewer, valid until 11:30Z on 2026-07-03.
Dataset register DATA-JUNO-020 maps DS-77 to reviewer role access requests for analytics workspace JW-5.
Temporary data access is complete only when authority covers user, dataset, role, start time, end time, and does not expire before the requested grant ends.
